entity.name: Sen. Ben Ray Luján
entity.description: Senator (D-NM), active on AI workforce, deepfakes, and rural broadband. Co-sponsor of NO FAKES Act and content-provenance bills. Operationally focused on labor and consumer-harm framings rather than catastrophic risk.

activity.title: Heinrich, Luján Press Trump Administration for Answers on School Bombing and Civilian Casualties in Iran
activity.raw_text: Senators Martin Heinrich (D-N.M.), a member of the U.S. Senate Select Intelligence Committee, and Ben Ray Luján (D-N.M.) sent a letter demanding that U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) Secretary Pete Hegseth provide answers to the American people on the airstrikes on a school in Minab, Iran and civilian casualties in the Trump Administration's illegal, reckless war on Iran. These concerns are compounded by the reported use of artificial intelligence tools to select and prioritize targets in Iran.

_verify_phrases: reported use of artificial intelligence tools to select and prioritize targets
